fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases now have exact face counts. Vertex counts differ by at most five (0.04%); authored output is +5 vertices solely at the 0.00001-unit Merge by Distance threshold. Authored bounds differ by at most 0.0245 units, and all tested bounds differ by at most 0.0601 units. Upstream marching-cell, realized-instance, Set Position, and Join Geometry topology matches Blender exactly.
